title: Storage in Crawley | Wolves Storage Sussex
meta: Managed storage in Crawley, West Sussex from £15/week. We collect across RH10 & RH11 — homes, businesses & Gatwick relocations.
hero_alt: Wolves Storage Sussex van collecting from a home in Crawley, West Sussex
sub: From Three Bridges to Bewbush and the Manor Royal business park, we bring fully managed container storage to your Crawley door — packing, collecting and storing at our alarmed warehouse, from £15 a week.
checks: We pack, seal & store for you
s1_h2: Managed Storage in Crawley — We Come to You
s1: As the largest town in West Sussex, Crawley keeps people and businesses on the move — relocating for a job at Gatwick or Manor Royal, downsizing from a family home in Maidenbower or Tilgate, or clearing a town-centre flat. Rather than hiring a van and battling the A23 to an out-of-town unit, our team brings managed container storage straight to your RH10 or RH11 door.

We pack and wrap your belongings, seal them into your own wooden container and drive them to our secure Ashington warehouse — you never lift a box. See exactly how it works, then pick a collection slot that fits around work and the school run.
img2_alt: Wolves team packing belongings into a container at a Crawley home
s2_h2: Storage for Crawley’s Homes, Businesses & Gatwick Movers
s2: Crawley’s mix of new-build estates, established neighbourhoods and the huge Manor Royal district means storage needs vary — families between houses, landlords turning over rentals, and businesses needing room for stock or archives. Our business storage frees up expensive Manor Royal floor space, while households store between moves.

With Gatwick on the doorstep we also help people relocating, working a season abroad or storing while they travel. Whether it’s a few weeks or a few years, the same managed service applies, from just £15 a week with no deposit — see our clear storage prices.
img3_alt: Sealed storage containers stored securely for Crawley customers
s3_h2: Storage Across Crawley & the Surrounding Area
s3: From our Ashington base we collect daily across Crawley and the neighbouring areas — Three Bridges, Ifield, Gossops Green, Pound Hill and Maidenbower, out towards Copthorne and Crawley Down. The managed model means distance is no problem: we come to you.
Heading south we also cover Horsham, and to the east East Grinstead and Haywards Heath. Tell us what you need to store and we’ll send a no-obligation quote within 24 hours.
img4_alt: Inside the secure Wolves Storage Sussex warehouse serving Crawley
faqs: Do you collect from across Crawley?
Yes — we collect right across the RH10 and RH11 postcodes, from Three Bridges and Pound Hill to Bewbush and Maidenbower, plus Copthorne and Crawley Down. You never drive a box anywhere.
Can you store business stock from Manor Royal?
Absolutely. Our business storage suits Manor Royal firms needing overflow space for stock, equipment or archives — we collect, store securely and redeliver when you need it.
I’m relocating through Gatwick — can you store short-term?
Yes. Short-term storage is billed weekly with no long contract, ideal if you’re between homes, working abroad or travelling. We can often collect within a few days.
Can you store my things long-term while I work abroad?

Yes — many Crawley customers store with us while working overseas or posted abroad through Gatwick. Long-term storage is fully insured, billed monthly at a lower rate, and we redeliver the moment you’re back.
Where is my storage kept?
In our alarmed, 24/7 CCTV warehouse in Ashington, West Sussex. Your belongings stay sealed in private wooden containers, fully insured, until you ask for them back.
cta: Need Storage in Crawley? Get a Free Quote

Our team packs and wraps everything, seals it into your own wooden container and stores it in our alarmed Ashington warehouse, returning it whenever you’re ready. It’s fully managed from £15 a week — see how it works.

s2: Bognor is a downsizing town, and parting with a lifetime’s belongings is easier when there’s no rush. Our flexible long-term storage lets you keep treasured furniture safe while you decide, while holiday-let owners along the coast use us to store between seasons.
We also handle the usual chain delays and renovations with weekly short-term storage, and look after furniture with care through our furniture storage — all fully insured, all from £15 a week.

Of course. Long-term storage is flexible with no long tie-in and better value the longer you stay, so you can keep furniture safe while you decide what to keep.
Can you store a holiday let’s furniture between seasons?
Yes — we collect, store sealed in our alarmed warehouse and redeliver when your season starts again. It’s a popular option along the Bognor coast.
How much is storage in Bognor Regis?
From £15 per week per container, no deposit and no hidden fees, with collection and redelivery included. Your free quote is confirmed within 24 hours.
Is my storage insured?
Yes — everything is fully insured and kept in an alarmed, 24/7 CCTV indoor warehouse, sealed in your own private container.

s1_h2: Managed Storage in Brighton & Hove — We Come to You
s1: Storing in Brighton & Hove the traditional way is a nightmare — narrow Victorian terraces, controlled parking, communal stairwells and very few affordable units. The managed model solves it: we bring the team and the vehicle to your BN1, BN2 or BN3 door, pack and wrap everything, and take it away. No van hire, no lifting, no driving across the city. See how it works.

Your belongings are sealed into your own wooden container and stored at our alarmed warehouse near the A27, then redelivered whenever you’re ready. It’s fully managed container storage from just £15 a week, with collection and redelivery included.
img2_alt: Wolves team carrying boxes down from a Brighton flat for storage
s2_h2: Storage for Brighton’s Flats, Students & Downsizers
s2: With two universities and a huge rental market, Brighton & Hove is full of people who need short bursts of storage — students storing over summer, tenants between lets, and couples merging flats. Our weekly short-term storage is billed by the week with no long contract, and we collect from halls, HMOs and flats alike.
We also help Hove’s downsizers and families moving out of the city with long-term storage and careful furniture storage. Whatever the timescale, it’s fully insured and from £15 a week.
img3_alt: Secure indoor container storage warehouse serving Brighton and Hove
s3_h2: Storage Across Brighton, Hove & the Coast
s3: From our Ashington base we collect across Brighton & Hove and the wider coast — the city centre, Kemptown, Hove, Portslade, Hangleton and Patcham. The managed service means the city’s parking and stairwells are our problem, not yours.
Westward along the A27 we also cover Shoreham-by-Sea and Worthing, and to the north Burgess Hill. Tell us what you need to store and we’ll quote within 24 hours.
img4_alt: Forklift moving sealed containers for Brighton and Hove customers
faqs: Do you cover Brighton and Hove?
Yes — we collect across BN1, BN2 and BN3, including the city centre, Kemptown, Hove, Portslade and Patcham. We handle the parking and stairs so you don’t have to.
Do you offer student storage in Brighton?
Yes — we collect from halls, houses and flats at the end of term, store your sealed boxes safely over summer and redeliver when you return. Weekly terms, no long contract.
I live in a flat with no parking — can you still collect?
Yes. Our team is used to Brighton’s terraces, communal stairwells and controlled parking. We bring the materials, do the carrying and seal everything into your container.
How much does storage in Brighton cost?
From £15 per week per container, no deposit and no hidden fees, with collection and redelivery included. Free quote within 24 hours.
Where is my storage kept?
In our alarmed, 24/7 CCTV warehouse in West Sussex, sealed in your own private wooden container and fully insured throughout.
cta: Storing in Brighton & Hove? Get a Free Quote
